notification.statusDegraded.title: Environment: {name} status changed
notification.statusRecovered.title: Environment: {name} recovered
notification.authError.title: Environment: {name} could not be updated
notification.authError.message: Could not connect to environment. Please check your credentials and try again. {error}
notification.dataFetchError.title: Environment: {name} could not be updated
notification.dataFetchError.message: Could not connect to environment. Please check your credentials and try again.
email.statusDegraded.subject: Environment {name} status changed to {to}
email.statusRecovered.subject: Environment {name} recovered
email.authError.subject: Environment {name} connection failed
email.dataFetchError.subject: Environment {name} could not be updated
email.alertIntro: There is an alert for environment **{name}**:
check.env.invalid: The environment is set to '{environment}'. It should be set to 'production' or 'staging'.
check.worker.enabled: The admin worker is enabled. This can cause performance issues. Consider using the CLI worker instead.
check.worker.disabled: Admin worker is disabled. CLI worker is being used.
check.task.allRunning: All scheduled tasks are running correctly.
check.frosh.phpGood: PHP version is up to date
check.frosh.mysqlGood: MySQL version is up to date
check.frosh.not-prod: Environment is not set to production
check.frosh.publicFilesystemGood: Public filesystem is using a proper adapter
check.frosh.publicFilesystemWarning: Public filesystem is using local adapter
check.frosh.privateFilesystemGood: Private filesystem is using a proper adapter
check.frosh.privateFilesystemWarning: Private filesystem is using local adapter
check.frosh.queueConnectionWarning: Queue connection is using sync adapter
check.frosh.sessionConnectionWarning: Session storage is using default file adapter
check.frosh.incrementWarning: Increment storage is using default adapter
check.frosh.numberRangeGood: Number range storage is properly configured
check.frosh.numberRangeWarning: Number range storage is using default adapter
check.frosh.lockWarning: Lock storage is using default flock adapter
